title: Bounded Worker Pool, Origin Fairness, Cancellation, and Shutdown · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: A regional emergency-information cooperative with many independent sources. They need adaptive publisher-respecting schedules, short database claims, fencing against late workers, bounded origin-aware concurrency, graceful shutdown, and failure-recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Fair Multi-Instance Freshness Scheduler with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, c…
objectives: Apply bounded exponential backoff with deterministic-testable jitter, reset rules, Retry-After, and maximum staleness escalation.
Claim a bounded due batch with ordered FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED work in a short transaction and release locks before network I/O.
Finalize success or failure only when source, attempt, token, and current lease match in one affected-row check.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Feed Go Backoff Jitter
steps.instruction:
project case — A project Go team handles case 2687 during a multilingual university archive import. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove bounded origin-aware worker ownership, failure isolation, cancellation, and joined shutdown; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, date, identity, content, or encoding case and reconcile provenance. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply bounded exponential backoff with deterministic-testable jitter, reset rules, Retry-After, and maximum staleness escalation.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Feed Go Backoff Jitter.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for apply bounded exponential backoff with deterministic-testable jitter, reset rules, retry-after, and maximum staleness escalation. For Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Project Feed Go Backoff Jitter, keep Feed Go Backoff Jitter connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
